summary: Excellent soundboard-quality recording of an ’88 gem with a fun “Stir It Up” and solid “Row Jimmy.”
review: The reviewer hails this March‑1988 show as a true gem, noting that the audio sounds just as good as most professional soundboard tapes. Highlights include an energetic “Stir It Up” and a tight performance of “Row Jimmy,” making both the music and the recording highly enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the soundboard‑level audio, indicating an outstanding show and excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer states the sound is "just as good as most soundboards you will see," implying clear, balanced mix with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; overall impression is that the show flows well and keeps the energy high.
